description_long: This is a modern L-shaped chaise upholstered in a deep blue fabric, featuring a right-side extended lounge section. The backrest is gently curved and rises to a medium height, providing ergonomic support along the entire length of the seating area. Both the left and right ends of the chaise have subtly rounded armrests that seamlessly integrate with the backrest, giving the piece a cohesive and contemporary silhouette. The seat consists of three distinct, thick cushions, with the rightmost cushion forming the extended lounge. The chaise is elevated on four short, tapered wooden legs with a dark finish, adding a touch of elegance and stability. The upholstery appears smooth and solid, with no visible patterns or tufting, emphasizing a clean and minimalist aesthetic.
description: A modern L-shaped blue chaise with a right-side lounge, curved backrest, and short tapered wooden legs. It features three thick seat cushions and smooth, solid upholstery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, three seat cushions, and both armrests with the right-side lounge extension clearly visible.
description_view_1: Right-side perspective highlighting the depth of the lounge section and the gentle curve of the backrest and armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, unbroken backrest and the four wooden legs supporting the chaise.
description_view_3: Left-side perspective emphasizing the main seating area, the left armrest, and the transition to the lounge section.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is medium-height, gently curved, and continuous along the length of the chaise, with no visible segmentation, tufting, or decorative elements. It provides a smooth, ergonomic contour that merges seamlessly with the armrests.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both the left and right sides, with a rounded, integrated design that flows from the backrest.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, straight, and slightly tapered, made of wood with a dark finish. They are simple and unadorned, contributing to the modern aesthetic.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid blue fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns, tufting, or quilting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are three thick, rectangular seat cushions: two on the main seating area and one forming the extended lounge. All cushions appear to be loose but fit snugly within the frame, creating a uniform and comfortable seating surface.
